title: Curation Criteria: What We Say No To

hook_slide.headline: What We Say NO To
hook_slide.subline: Our uncompromising standards ensure truly transformative intimacy experiences for you.
hook_slide.image_concept: Deep, rich crimson and charcoal textures, a subtle interplay of light and shadow, suggesting depth and discernment.

education_slides.headline: No to Superficiality
education_slides.body: We reject quick fixes and surface-level advice. True intimacy requires depth, understanding, and a willingness to explore beyond the obvious.
education_slides.image_concept: A single, elegant feather gently resting on a dark, polished surface, symbolizing lightness but hinting at underlying strength.

education_slides.headline: No to One-Size-Fits-All
education_slides.body: Every couple's journey is unique. We don't believe in generic solutions, instead focusing on personalized approaches that honor individual desires and dynamics.
education_slides.image_concept: Abstract interlocking shapes, each distinct yet harmoniously connected, against a muted, sophisticated backdrop.

education_slides.headline: No to Fear-Based Narratives
education_slides.body: Intimacy should be empowering, not intimidating. We avoid content that instills shame or fear, promoting curiosity and brave exploration instead.
education_slides.image_concept: A soft, diffused light breaking through a subtle mist, suggesting clarity emerging from uncertainty, in warm tones.

education_slides.headline: No to Lack of Research
education_slides.body: Our guidance is rooted in evidence and thoughtful inquiry. We dismiss baseless claims, ensuring our education is always credible and well-informed.
education_slides.image_concept: Close-up of a beautifully bound, antique-looking book, open to an intriguing page, on a dark wooden table.

education_slides.headline: No to Inauthenticity
education_slides.body: We value genuine connection. Content that feels performative or disingenuous doesn't align with our commitment to real, vulnerable intimacy.
education_slides.image_concept: A raw, unglazed ceramic piece with intentional imperfections, celebrating natural form and texture against a soft, neutral canvas.

education_slides.headline: No to Unsafe Practices
education_slides.body: Safety and consent are paramount. We rigorously vet all practices and advice to ensure they promote well-being, respect, and mutual understanding.
education_slides.image_concept: Two hands gently touching, conveying trust and care, with a soft focus and warm, inviting colors.

education_slides.headline: No to Stagnation
education_slides.body: Growth is essential. We avoid static, repetitive content, always seeking fresh perspectives and innovative ways to deepen your intimate life.
education_slides.image_concept: A subtle ripple effect on a dark, reflective water surface, symbolizing continuous movement and evolution.

framework_slide.title: Our 7 Pillars of Rejection
framework_slide.image_concept: A minimalist, elegant infographic style, using clean lines and a sophisticated color palette (dark greys, deep purples) to list the points.

cta_slide.headline: Curated by Dark Fantasy
cta_slide.image_concept: Dark Fantasy logo (minimalist, elegant) centered on a warm, textured background (e.g., deep velvet or brushed metal in warm tones).

caption: We believe true intimacy is built on discernment. Our commitment is to what we *don't* accept, ensuring every piece of guidance elevates your relationship. Discover our uncompromising standards. Link in bio! #SoftLifeIntimacy #CouplesEducation #BodySafe #RelationshipTips #IntimacyCoach #WellnessJourney #CouplesTherapy #IntimacyWellness #SelfCareCouples #DarkFantasy
